creator: larse@isi.edu
text:
Pete (or -bugs people),

has this fix been ported to 4.X? 

I'm having some problems with the PCMPC100 under 4.X which seem to be due
to the ed driver only supporting it as an NE2000 with 8K card memory
instead of a "true" Linksys.

If so, could you please post it?

Thanks,
Lars
-- 
Lars Eggert <larse@isi.edu>                 Information Sciences Institute
http://www.isi.edu/larse/                University of Southern California
